svg.text: Discovery, not registration · ROS action is the only skill API · One process per provider host
Task monitor · Skill browser · BT tree viewer
maps each XML tag → ROS action goal
Same SkillBase API as real atoms
★ Sim path: each provider launch accepts namespace_prefix:=/sim → paired /sim/* action surface; TreeExecutor synthesises sim paths at parse time.
Discovery flows up: every provider proxy publishes <node>/skills (TRANSIENT_LOCAL · LIVELINESS_AUTOMATIC). Action calls flow back down: the orchestrator's TreeExecutor resolves entries from
the runtime registry, then dispatches the goal directly to the right host. Single-box deployments (lab-sim, real-native, lite-native) collapse all hosts onto one PC — DDS graph is identical.
